title: Relics of Old
description: A mod about discovering old relics and anchient knowledge.
body:
Relics is a mod about discovering old relics and anchient knowledge. "One day you find an old, ancient looking tome by your local libarian. Within its pages are records of long forgotten artefacts and magical occurrence that can be witnessed around the world. But some pages have gone missing over the ages. Who knows, maybe some of them are still out there?" This mod requires: * Mantle * Curios * Patchouli * ExpandAbility The focus of this mod is around 2 aspects: So called relics, that provide various effects that can be worn old, forgotten mechanics/blocks/content from old minecraft version (pre 1.7) Some items also take direct inspreation from popular video games or other media. (and the occasional, fun/random inclusion of some blocks that i wanted to have) Main features: All content is documented in the "Ancient Tome of Relics", as description above in the intro text. which also means, some content has to be first unlocked, by finding the missing pages, also calles "lost pages". Some examples are: *sword pedestal (in varios shapes and variants) *shooting stars *a little and light magic themed crafting system Credits: Thanks to Golui for the original sword pedestal mod [Link](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1286680-1-4-6-forge-goluis-mods-sword-pedestal-1-1-1)
Master Sword Texture by [luckyhouston](https://stash.dokucraft.co.uk/?profile=luckyhouston)
"Oddish in Pot" (https://skfb.ly/oUKqC) by 1amB1GB4ND is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
Stone Model by [CrazyPigglet](https://skfb.ly/6Vx9Q) shine sound Sound Effect by Benjamin Adams from Pixabay
Pixel Art Heart by [Goblin Mode Games](https://goblin-mode-games.itch.io/) Scrolls and Book Texture by [Kyrises](https://opengameart.org/content/kyrises-free-16x16-rpg-icon-pack)
Emerald Piece/Shard, all falling star related textures (star piece, dust, stone, stone block, skybeam block, magic powder) where made by [cebularz_](https://www.curseforge.com/members/cebularz_/projects)
Big thanks to gigaherz for the .obj model handle
Thanks to MinecraftschurliMods for the ShapeUtil, which is based off Mekanism's VoxelShapeUtils
